summary.zh: Out of Topic Quality，论外质量等级
summary.en: Out of Topic Quality, ranking system for Out-of-Topic characters
summary.ja: Out of Topic Quality、論外品質等級

description.zh:
OOTQ（Out of Topic Quality）是MUGEN中用于评价角色强度等级的标准。

分级体系

论外分为下位、中位、上位、最上位四个等级，每个等级又分为A、B、C三个子级。

判定标准

以攻击面达到论外级别（可击破Test-Over-God）为基准，根据启动速度、攻击手段、防装能力进行综合分级。
description.en:
OOTQ (Out of Topic Quality) is the standard for evaluating character strength levels in MUGEN.

Classification System

Out-of-Topic is divided into Low, Mid, High, and Top tiers, each with A, B, and C sub-levels.

Criteria

Based on attack reach (able to defeat Test-Over-God), classified by activation speed, attack methods, and defensive capabilities.
description.ja:
OOTQ（Out of Topic Quality）はMUGENにおけるキャラクター強度評価の標準。

分级体系

論外は下位、中位、上位、最上位の四等級に分けられ、各等級はA、B、Cの三つのサブレベルを持つ。

判定基準

論外级别（Test-Over-Godを撃破可能）を攻撃面とし、起動速度、攻撃手段、防御能力で総合分级。
